title: Peanut Dutch Breeze
description: A smoky and fluffy dutch dish featuring peanut oil that is also diabetic-friendly, perfect for kids.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Ensure chicken is cooked thoroughly to ensure safety.

ingredients.name: Thyme Sprig
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried can be used.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium version if available.

instructions: In a large skillet, heat peanut oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced chicken and cook until golden brown, about 4-6 minutes per side.
Add sweet potato cubes, carrots, onion, minced garlic, thyme sprig, and soy sauce to the skillet with chicken. Stir well to coat vegetables with the chicken juices.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish. Bake for 20-25 minutes until the chicken is fully cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Garnish with fresh herbs or lemon wedges if desired.
